day_trace.speech: Hey, everyone, listen! I didn’t do anything last night, but I saw two dank ghosts, Dr. Pizza and EasyBake, sneaking around! EasyBake Are you a cobbler? Will it be buried together with a werewolf pizza? Today's goal is the same. If the other person acts stupid or leads the way, I will kill him directly! Tell me your identity quickly before I get angry!

You are a troupe of actors performing here, one is pretending to be a grump, one is pretending to be a cobbler, and one is pretending to be a logic monster. The complete set of scripts is to protect the core nodes of your werewolf camp! I dare to say that this game is basically a psychological test designed to exclude those of us who have the ability to think independently. Your accusations are all temporary lines arranged by the stage! I will never fall into such a low-end drama like yours. I will definitely expose the trump card of this fictitious prison!

This reconciliation program that you conspired to establish is just to cleanse the monitoring software of us observers! I vote for Dr. Pizza!
